title: study_esap
description: Study eSAP Model schema: binds AC/DC Transformations and Methods to a study's objectives, endpoints, and estimands. Bridges USDM study structure, AC/DC concept/method library, and ARS. Validates study eSAP instance files.

version.description: Semantic version of the study eSAP model

$provenance.description: Declares external model dependencies — bill of materials for referenced entities

usdm.description: CDISC Unified Study Definitions Model — source for study structure entities

entities.description: USDM entity names referenced in this schema

acdc_transformation.description: AC/DC Transformation & Method Model — source for reusable transformation and phrase templates

ars.description: Analysis Results Standard — source for analysis result definitions

$defs._comment_cross_references: Cross-reference stubs for entities defined in other schemas

TransformationRef.description: Reference to a Transformation defined in the Transformation & Method Model (Sheet 5)
TransformationRef.$comment: When transformation.schema.json is published, replace with $ref to https://cdisc.org/acdc/transformation#/$defs/Transformation

SmartPhraseRef.description: Reference to a SmartPhrase template defined in the Transformation & Method Model (Sheet 5)
SmartPhraseRef.$comment: When transformation.schema.json is published, replace with $ref to https://cdisc.org/acdc/transformation#/$defs/SmartPhrase

ARSAnalysisRef.description: Reference to an ARS Analysis. StudyAnalysis is-a ARS Analysis.
ARSAnalysisRef.$comment: Links to the CDISC Analysis Results Standard model

analysisId.description: Identifier of the referenced ARS Analysis

$defs._comment_esap_owned: eSAP-owned entities (purple in diagram) — defined and governed by this schema

StudyBinding.description: A study-level resolved binding — a copy of a transformation template Binding with study-specific modifications (added, removed, or changed bindings). Same shape as acdc_transformations.schema Binding.

concept.description: Concept OID or name being bound (e.g. C.Measure, C.Change, Subject, AnalysisVisit)

methodRole.description: The method input role this concept is bound to (e.g. response, covariate, fixed_effect)

direction.description: Whether this binding supplies input to the method or captures its output

dataStructureRole.description: The structural role: measure (value being computed), dimension (grouping/partitioning), or attribute (metadata)

slice.description: Reference to a named slice that constrains this binding (e.g. 'baseline')

qualifierType.description: Qualifier type from shared qualifier vocabulary

requiredValueType.description: Required FHIR/data type for the bound concept (e.g. Quantity, CodeableConcept)

description.description: Human-readable description of this binding's purpose

StudyConfigurationValue.description: A resolved configuration parameter value for a study-level analysis or derivation step

name.description: Configuration parameter name (matches a Method Configuration name)

StudySlice.description: A resolved data slice for a study-level step — specifies the concrete dimension values that segment the data

name.description: Slice name (matches a Transformation Slice name)

resolvedValues.description: Dimension name → resolved value(s) for this study

StudySmartPhrase.description: A resolved SmartPhrase — a template phrase with study-specific parameter values filled in

basedOn.description: The SmartPhrase template this resolved phrase is based on

resolvedText.description: The fully resolved text with all parameters substituted

ResolvedExpression.description: A method formula resolved with study-level concept bindings — the method provides the template, the transformation provides bindings, the study resolves to actual concepts and interactions

notation.description: Formula notation system from the method

resolved.description: The fully resolved expression with study-level concept names substituted (e.g., 'C.Change ~ C.Measure@Baseline + Treatment + Site')

interactions.description: Active interaction terms in the resolved expression (e.g., ['C.Measure@Baseline:Treatment'])

StudyOutputClassConfig.description: Study-level output dimension selection for a specific output class — specifies which method-declared dimensions to include in the reported output. When absent for an output class, all dimensions are included.

outputClass.description: Name of the output class (e.g., 'type3_tests', 'ls_means') — matches a method output_specification.output_classes[].class

selectedDimensions.description: Subset of the resolved dimension concepts to include in the output. Uses concept names (e.g., 'Treatment', 'Treatment:Site') resolved from method role bindings.

StudyStep.description: Abstract base for StudyAnalysis and StudyDerivation — shared composition of transformation binding, configurations, slices, and phrases

sequence.description: Execution order within the parent step list

basedOn.description: The Transformation template this step instantiates

configurationValues.description: Resolved configuration parameter values for this step

resolvedBindings.description: Study-level resolved bindings — copies of the transformation template bindings with study-specific modifications (added, removed, or changed bindings)

resolvedSlices.description: Resolved data slices for this step

resolvedPhrases.description: Resolved SmartPhrase texts for this step

resolvedExpression.description: The method formula resolved with study-level concept bindings and active interactions

outputConfiguration.description: Optional per-output-class dimension selection. When absent, all method-declared dimensions are included in each output class.

StudyDerivation.description: A study-level derivation step — instantiates a Transformation template to derive a variable for an endpoint

StudyAnalysis.description: A study-level analysis step — instantiates a Transformation template to produce statistical results. Is-a ARS Analysis.

arsAnalysis.description: Link to the corresponding ARS Analysis definition (StudyAnalysis is-a ARS Analysis)

$defs._comment_usdm_references: USDM reference entities (green in diagram) — minimal projections of CDISC USDM entities. additionalProperties: true allows pass-through of full USDM data.

StudyTitle.description: USDM: Text representation of the study title

NarrativeContentItem.description: USDM: An individual content item within narrative content

NarrativeContent.description: USDM: Structured narrative content within a document version, with recursive children

contentItem.description: The content item for this section (0..1)

AnalysisPopulation.description: USDM: A subset of the study population used for analysis

StudyIntervention.description: USDM: A treatment or intervention applied in the study

IntercurrentEvent.description: USDM: An event occurring after treatment initiation that affects interpretation or existence of measurements

strategy.description: Strategy for handling the intercurrent event (e.g. treatment policy, composite, hypothetical)

SyntaxTemplate.description: USDM: A template definition with parameterizable text (SmartPhrase is-a SyntaxTemplate)

StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion.description: USDM: A version of a study definition document

contents.description: Narrative content sections in this document version (0..*)

StudyDefinitionDocument.description: USDM: A study definition document (e.g. the eSAP). Note: type 'eSAP' requires USDM codelist extension of C215477.

type.description: Document type — 'eSAP' is a proposed extension to USDM codelist C215477

Endpoint.description: USDM: A study endpoint — the variable of interest measured to address an objective

derivationSteps.description: Derivation steps that produce this endpoint's analysis variable (0..*)

Objective.description: USDM: A study objective — a goal the study is designed to achieve

Estimand.description: USDM: An estimand — a precise description of the treatment effect to be estimated (ICH E9 R1)

analysisPopulation.description: The analysis population for this estimand (1)

interventions.description: Study interventions compared in this estimand (1..*)

intercurrentEvents.description: Intercurrent events and their handling strategies (0..*)

analysisSteps.description: Analysis steps that address this estimand (1..*)

StudyDesign.description: USDM: The experimental design of the study

StudyVersion.description: USDM: A version of the study definition

documentVersions.description: Document versions associated with this study version (0..*)

Study.description: USDM: The root study entity — top-level container for the eSAP

documentedBy.description: Study definition documents (e.g. the eSAP document) (0..*)
